verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm forgiven because You were forsaken I'm accepted You were condemned I'm alive and well Your Spirit is within me Because You died And rose again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Amazing love, how can it be That You, my King, Should die for me? Amazing love, I know it's true It's my joy to honor You In all I do, To honor You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: BRIDGE You are my King You are my King Jesus, You are my King You are my King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In all I do, To honor You, In all I do, To honor You, In all I do, Let me honor You.
